name: Peach Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Place bread cubes in a greased 9-inch square pan.
3. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, sugar, and almond extract until well combined.
4. Stir in 1 Cup of the peach pie filling into the egg mixture.
5. Pour the custard over the bread cubes, pressing it down gently with the back of a spoon to ensure even distribution.
6. Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. After baking, use a knife test to check if the pudding is cooked through.
8. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
9. Serve with remaining peach pie filling drizzled on top.
